root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

auditor_name.default: นายบุญชัย ชุมแสงหิรัญ
auditor_name.text: ผู้ตรวจสอบบัญชี

root.sql:
select (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , 'วันที่ sd month yyyy' ) as confirm_date_thai , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '!auditor_name!' as auditor_name
, (case when sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '001' then 'นอกหน่วย' when sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '100' then 'เจ้าหน้าที่' when sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '500' then 'พ.บำนาญ' when sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '600' then 'พ.ปัจจุบัน' else sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name end) as member_group_short
from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type in ('01','02') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '30/04/2024' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '100' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no

r_port_book_confirm_mem_nest_auditor.sql:
select * from ( select (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , 'วันที่ sd month yyyy' ) as confirm_date_thai , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then '1' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then '2' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then '3' end) as sort_data_group
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then 'หุ้นปกติ' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then 'เงินฝาก' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then 'หนี้เงินกู้' end) as name_data_group
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then (select deposit_name from sc_dep_m_rule where deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type) when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then (select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type) end) as data_group_description
from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type in ('01','02') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = {0} and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = {1} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '01/05/2024' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '100' --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = '00183' ) tab order by sort_data_group , data_type

r_port_book_confirm_mem_nest_mem.sql:
select * from ( select (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , 'วันที่ sd month yyyy' ) as confirm_date_thai , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then '1' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then '2' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then '3' end) as sort_data_group
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then 'หุ้นปกติ' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then 'เงินฝาก' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then 'หนี้เงินกู้' end) as name_data_group
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then (select deposit_name from sc_dep_m_rule where deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type) when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then (select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type) end) as data_group_description
from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type in ('01','02') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = {0} and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = {1} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '01/05/2024' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '100' --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no = '00183' ) tab order by sort_data_group , data_type
